name: openEuler sig-bio SIG
description: SIG bio focus on adapting bioinfomatic software ecosystem for openEuler.

name: openEuler sig-bio SIG Repository List
description: openEuler sig-bio SIG maintains 36 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-bio SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for SIG bio focus on adapting bioinfomatic software ecosystem for openEuler.. The SIG has 4 core members and maintains 36 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-bio SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-bio SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at dev@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-bio SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-bio SIG maintains 36 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-bio.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-bio SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-bio SIG has 4 Maintainers, including: Ren Gui He, Zhao Yang, Guoyi Zhang. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
